Off Calendar Aug-30-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-16-2011 Continued To Aug-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Taylor for Pamela Mithcell (Successor Executor). Ray Gary also present.

The Court stated that it has Mr. Gary's declaration. Mr. Taylor that he received no objection to the petition. The Court advised Counsel that the case may need interpretation of the will in the future. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court). Bond is fixed at $10,000.00.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
